CRM for Brokers • 2/8/2026 • 6 min

Automating Client Base Management for Brokers

How to automate routine client management processes from registration and verification to reactivation of inactive traders.

MakeTrades Team
Эксперт MakeTrades

Automated Client Onboarding

Modern broker CRM platforms automate the entire onboarding process: registration form validation, email verification, KYC document collection and OCR processing, risk assessment questionnaire evaluation, and trading account creation. What once required 2-3 business days and multiple manual steps now completes in minutes, dramatically improving the client experience and reducing dropout rates.

Lifecycle Automation

Beyond onboarding, automation manages the entire client lifecycle. Deposit confirmation triggers welcome sequences. First trade completion unlocks advanced educational content. Withdrawal requests initiate compliance checks automatically. Birthday and anniversary messages maintain personal touch at scale. Each trigger is configurable and testable within the CRM workflow editor.

Reactivation Campaigns

Inactive clients represent untapped revenue. Automated reactivation workflows identify dormant accounts based on configurable criteria, then execute multi-step campaigns combining email, SMS, and personal manager outreach. Incentives like deposit bonuses, reduced spreads, or exclusive market analysis are offered based on the client's historical trading profile and deposit level.

Tags: automationclient baseKYCverificationreactivationsales funnel
